title: Xi Zi Feng
content:
A girl, between many people that saved by Wang Lin from collapsing Thunder Celestial Realm by paying him Celstial Jades.

She eventually fell in love with Wang Lin and stay faithful to her feeling against all odds for hundreds years. She even destroy her face to avoid many scoundrels who tried to take advantage of her in those chaotic situation after war.

Wang Lin returned from the Outer Realm 800 years later and meet her. He seemed to be moved by her determination, but since he could not return her love, he accepted her as his disciple instead. Wang Lin then asked her to go with him, but she didn't want to leave Allheaven her home. Wang Lin then raised her cultivation and gift her a powerful weapon. He further killed all people who wronged her.

She spent the first out of the three years that Wang lin had to spent in order to protect his 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
 by his side.
